view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for maximum capacity is not satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for maximum capacity is not satisfied.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for maximum capacity is not satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the maximum capacity of 12 people for the tour. However, the evidence from the prior step 'uc-need-validate-1' indicates that only 2 bookings were confirmed, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants to run the tour. This confirms a gap in the requirement coverage regarding the maximum capacity, as the current state does not allow for the tour to proceed with only 2 bookings.
